FlavourText.en: Give up your flesh unto the gods, and in vulnerability find strength.
FlavourText.zh: 将身躯尽数献出，在脆弱中寻找力量。

FlavourText.en: Burn the spirit to vitalise the flesh.
FlavourText.zh: 燃烧意志，滋养血肉。

FlavourText.en: You may live forever, so long as someone remains to be sacrificed.
FlavourText.zh: 只要自愿作出牺牲，你就可以长生不朽。

FlavourText.en: As true belief fades, the facade of faith grows, leaving you powerful but hollow.
FlavourText.zh: 正念消褪筑高墙，高墙愈坚愈迷惘。

FlavourText.en: Wreathed in madness and blood, you are unstoppable.
FlavourText.zh: 身披鲜血与疯狂，打遍天下无敌手。

FlavourText.en: Tasalio and Valako test you, child of the volcano. Prove yourself worthy.
FlavourText.zh: 这是塔赛里奥和瓦拉克的试炼，火山之子。证明你的价值吧。

FlavourText.en: Utter trust in your defence unleashes ultimate potential.
FlavourText.zh: 相信防御，你将有无限潜力。

FlavourText.en: No man may enslave you, for you have a secret: you're always angry.
FlavourText.zh: 没人可以奴役你，因为你始终愤怒不已。

FlavourText.en:
Invite the enemy when you are strong, evade them when you are weak;
strike with the coming of the storm.
FlavourText.zh:
强大时与敌为友，虚弱时暂避其锋，
时机一到就出手。

FlavourText.en: The fewer there are, the less you have to share.
FlavourText.zh: 数量越少，你分出去的就更少。

FlavourText.en: You circle the black scorpion with enmity, daring it time and again.
FlavourText.zh: 你带着敌意环绕黑蝎，屡败屡战。

FlavourText.en: Speak not, but listen, for danger reveals itself on the wind.
FlavourText.zh: 少说多听，危险在风声中吐露踪迹。

FlavourText.en: Put your faith in intellect rather than mysticism.
FlavourText.zh: 少一点玄学，多一点理性。

FlavourText.en: Master the mortal world, and you may find immortality beyond.
FlavourText.zh: 一旦主宰凡人世界，你将发现超凡之道。

FlavourText.en: Your every move is calm and calculated with absolute certainty.
FlavourText.zh: 你的每一步都从容自若，十拿九稳。

FlavourText.en: Empowered by the divine, you fear no weapon of man.
FlavourText.zh: 神力加持之下，无需畏惧凡人的刀兵。

FlavourText.en: You may find that having is less pleasing a thing than wanting.
FlavourText.zh: 你会发现，期待比占有更有乐趣。

FlavourText.en: Your fiery passion inspires everyone around you - especially your foes.
FlavourText.zh: 你高昂的激情鼓舞了周围每一个人，除了敌人。

FlavourText.en:
You are the heart of the empire, shining bright so that all are lifted up by your light.
Let none tell you otherwise.
FlavourText.zh:
你是帝国之心，给所有人带来光明。
除此之外，你一无所知。

FlavourText.en:
Displays of power are not just for show. If you are never truly tested,
you may divert those resources elsewhere.
FlavourText.zh:
仅用于力量并非宣示。如果你不愿尝试，
那力量多半会转向别处。

FlavourText.en:
The most important lesson the company
taught was simple. Be clever, and survive.
FlavourText.zh:
黑镰最重要的一条训诫朴实无华，
头脑机敏，勉励求生。

FlavourText.en:
It is both despair and inspiration, to look back,
and see oneself in the cycles of Time.
FlavourText.zh:
回首过去，发现自己深陷轮回，
既是绝望，同样也是一种启迪。

FlavourText.en:
Many men throughout history have claimed to
stand against evil. Only a few truly meant it.
FlavourText.zh:
不计其数的人立誓对抗邪恶。
信守诺言之人却是寥寥无几。

FlavourText.en: I pledge my soul to you, Liege of the Lightless, and vow to conquer nations in your name!
FlavourText.zh: 我将我的灵魂献给你，暗光领主，誓要以你之名征服万国！

FlavourText.en: I pledge my soul to you, Lord of Liches, and vow to end the scourge of Life itself!
FlavourText.zh: 我将我的灵魂献给你，巫妖之王，誓要终结生命这一祸患！

FlavourText.en: I pledge my soul to you, the Blackblooded, and vow to usurp the power of Darkness!
FlavourText.zh: 我将我的灵魂献给你，黑血之众，誓要夺取黑暗的力量！

FlavourText.en: I pledge my soul to you, Hated Slave, and vow to exact revenge upon your kind!
FlavourText.zh: 我将我的灵魂献给你，憎恨之奴，誓要向你的同类复仇！

FlavourText.en: I pledge my soul to you, Sovereign of the Well, and vow to bring eternal night!
FlavourText.zh: 我将我的灵魂献给你，弱言领主，誓要带来永恒的黑夜！
